steps.title: Dry Surface Cleaning
instructions: Clean the door surface using a
to remove dust and loose particles.

steps.title: Wet Surface Cleaning
instructions: Apply IP solution to the wiping cloth.
Clean the door surface thoroughly using the wet cloth.
Place the wiping cloth back into the tools cabinet after use.

steps.title: Grommet Installation
instructions: Fix the grommet at the designated position.

steps.title: Seal Fixing
instructions: Fit the seal into the clamp.
Stick the seal onto the door by gradually removing the backing tape.
Press the seal firmly with both hands to ensure proper adhesion.

steps.title: Upper Side Pressing
instructions: Perform back-to-back pressing at the same position on the upper side of the door using the right hand.

steps.title: Bottom Side Pressing
instructions: Perform back-to-back pressing at the same position on the bottom side of the door.
